items.name: Dopp Kit Toilet Pouch – Damier Graphite Canvas (N40127)
items.notes:
A clean, masculine travel essential from Louis Vuitton, the Dopp Kit in Damier Graphite is the understated alternative to the classic Monogram — the same House craftsmanship in a refined dark graphite canvas that travels without announcing itself.
Generously sized for daily grooming essentials, the double zip opening with magnetic flap provides wide, easy access. The wide top handle carries comfortably in hand or hangs from a bathroom hook. The washable interior lining makes maintenance effortless — a thoughtful detail for a piece designed for actual travel use.
This example is in like-new condition with only occasional travel use. Presented with original dustbag, box, and receipt.
Features

Damier Graphite coated canvas
Cowhide leather trim
Silver-color hardware
Double zip closure with magnetic flap
Wide hanging handle
Washable textile lining
Large capacity interior with zip pocket
Dimensions: 28 x 15 x 16.5 cm

Condition: Like new — occasional travel use only
Accompanied by: Original dustbag, box, and receipt

SKU: N40127
Material: Damier Graphite coated canvas
Hardware: Silver-tone
Origin: France / Made in France, Spain, Italy, or US per LV

items.name: Hac à Dos GM – Veau Barenia Faubourg, Fauve (H083848CK34)
items.notes:
The Hac à Dos is among the most considered pieces in the modern Hermès lineup — rooted in the DNA of the legendary Haut à Courroies, reimagined as a backpack for daily life. This GM (Grand Modèle) example is crafted in Barenia Faubourg, the most prestigious leather in the Hac à Dos range and among the most coveted in the entire Hermès universe.
Barenia Faubourg is exclusive to Hermès, associated with the storied Maison at 24 Faubourg Saint-Honoré. Smooth and waxy to the touch, it develops a rich, individual patina over time — a quality that separates it from every other leather in the house.
The colorway is Fauve (CK34) — a warm, luminous honey-tan that works across every season and context. Palladium hardware provides a clean, lasting finish.
This piece was purchased directly from the Hermès boutique at 17 Rue de Sèvres, Paris in May 2023 at the then-boutique price of €8,450 EUR. It has been barely used and was recently professionally conditioned at an official Hermès boutique spa — the leather is in exceptional health and perfectly prepared for its next chapter of wear and patina development. Current retail for this configuration now stands at approximately $13,600 USD, reflecting significant price appreciation since purchase.
Features

Large main compartment
Interior back pocket with D-ring
Adjustable padded canvas shoulder strap — wearable as backpack, crossbody, or over-shoulder
Hand-stitched throughout
Made in France

Condition: Barely used. Recently serviced at official Hermès boutique spa.
Accompanied by: Original Hermès box, dustbag, lock, keys, clochette, original receipt from Hermès Paris. All accessories in excellent condition.

SKU: H083848CK34
Leather: Veau Barenia Faubourg
Color: Fauve (CK34)
Size: GM
Hardware: Palladium
Origin: France
Purchased: Hermès, 17 Rue de Sèvres, Paris — May 2023

items.name: Pocket Organiser – American Alligator (N91553)
items.notes:
Crafted from genuine American Alligator (Alligator mississippiensis), this Louis Vuitton Pocket Organiser represents the pinnacle of exotic leather goods. The American alligator — prized above most crocodilians for its larger, more uniform scale pattern and exceptional skin quality — is the material of choice for the world's finest luxury houses. Each piece is unique by nature.

Despite its slim profile (3" × 4.4" × 0.4"), it is remarkably functional: five interior pockets, one exterior pocket, and three dedicated credit card slots. It slips effortlessly into a jacket pocket or bag without bulk — an everyday carry that happens to be an heirloom.

The Navy Blue colorway is rich and versatile, working equally well with tailored suiting or more casual dress.

Provenance & Documentation
This piece is accompanied by its original CITES export documentation issued in France, confirming the species as Alligator mississippiensis and certifying its legal origin. For serious collectors and international buyers, this documentation is essential and increasingly rare with pre-owned exotic goods.

SKU: N91553
Material: American Alligator (Alligator mississippiensis)
Color: Navy Blue
Dimensions: 3" × 4.4" × 0.4"
Original Retail: $2,630 USD
CITES Documentation: Included (issued in France)
Condition: Lightly Loved
